caption: The video begins with a dark scene, where only a few lights from a building and a parked white car are visible in the distance. A step ladder stands near the building. The scene then shifts to a close-up, top-down view of the ground, illuminated by a bright circular light source. The ground consists of light-colored soil and sparse green vegetation. There are no people visible in any of the frames, and no text or logos appear on the screen. The sequence transitions from a wide, dark outdoor shot of a residential or industrial area at night to a focused, brightly lit view of the earth's surface.
